theme_strategy: The Arcane Terminal - Fusing mystical high-fantasy lore with brutalist, high-density data analytics. Dark mode by default to represent the 'Forge' and protect eyes during long deck-building sessions.

headings.usage: Use for all main H1/H2 titles, commander names, and hero text.

data_and_stats.usage: CRITICAL: Use for all numbers, prices, mana values, card counts, percentages, and simulation outputs.

hierarchy_rules: Overlines/Labels: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono text-muted-foreground
Never center-align data. Left-align dense content.

colors.primary_description: Forge Orange - Use for the Generate CTA, primary actions, and sparks/progress bars.
colors.secondary_description: Mana Blue - Use for informational highlights and neutral interactive elements.
rules: Never use pure black or pure white. All grays must be tinted slightly with blue or orange.
Use high-contrast text ratios for all data (APCA standard).
Do NOT use teal green or teal blue (#1B93A4).

spacing_and_layout.global: Generous Spacing Philosophy: p-6 or p-8 for main containers. However, internal data tables must be dense.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Mode B: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4) for data widgets.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: Use a persistent, glassmorphism vertical sidebar (or a highly customized scrollable horizontal sub-nav) for the 14 result tabs to avoid clutter.
spacing_and_layout.commander_presentation: Asymmetrical. The Commander card/art should span a dominant column (col-span-1 row-span-2), while stats/curves fill the remaining grid compactly.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). border-collapse style layout. Expose the skeleton. border-r border-b border-border/40. No soft shadows. Max 4px border-radius.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers: Glassmorphism (Crystal Variant). bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-xl and backdrop-saturate-150. 1px delicate inner stroke border-white/10.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.interactive_widgets: Neumorphism (Tactile) mixed with sharp borders. 1px border-white/5 grounding it.

component_guidelines.tabs: Do not use standard pill-tabs for the 14 sections. Use an explicit Sidebar Nav or cleanly underlined scrollable tabs (border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-primary).
component_guidelines.tables_and_lists: Dense, cardless. Use 1px borders between rows. Make heavy use of Shadcn Table, heavily stripped of padding (py-1 or py-2 max per row).
component_guidelines.charts: Use Recharts (via Shadcn Charts). Mana Curve needs a BarChart. Deck-quality scores need a RadarChart. Style them with the monospace font and brand colors.
component_guidelines.forms: Use Shadcn Select, Switch, and Slider for generation controls (cEDH, Budget, Toggles). Keep them compact.
component_guidelines.progress: For the 'Generate' button, use 'The Tracing Beam' effect (moving gradient border) and a matrix/terminal-like loading text cycle.

visual_enhancers.textures: Apply a subtle noise overlay (mix-blend-overlay, opacity 10%) across the main background to kill the digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glows: Use very subtle drop-shadows on combo synergy badges to make them feel like glowing arcane runes.
visual_enhancers.mana_symbols: Ensure mana symbols are aligned optically with text. Do not just drop raw SVGs; wrap them in a circular span with proper centering.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Hovering over a card name MUST explicitly change text color and show the card image preview floating nearby (Tooltip/Popover).
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform duration-200. NO transition-all.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Entrance animations should be staggered. Use Framer Motion for list items appearing in the decklist.

hero_background.usage: Use as a large, low-opacity (10-20%) background overlay in the hero/search section to establish the 'Forge' atmosphere. Use mix-blend-screen.

mystical_overlay.usage: Can be used for the 'Empty State' or 'Loading/Generating' modal.

images_and_assets.icons: Use lucide-react (already installed). If more dense, add @phosphor-icons/react.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against the dark background has a minimum 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='generate-deck-btn', data-testid='card-row').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a dark-mode only application. Override index.css completely to force the dark palette.
The UI is a dense 'Bloomberg Terminal' for MTG. Prioritize information density over massive white space in the data views.
For the massive results section with 14 tabs, implement a left-aligned vertical sidebar navigation layout instead of horizontal tabs to prevent the UI from breaking.
Integrate Shadcn forms, tables, tabs, switches, select, and charts. Customize them strictly to the Grid Borders (Technical Look) guidelines.
Do NOT use HTML <select> or <input type='date'>.
Use Sonner for all toast notifications (e.g., 'Deck Exported to Moxfield').
Hovering over MTG card names must show the image. Mock this behavior visually if actual Scryfall API integration is pending.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable in layout containers, but keep data widgets dense.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES: Design for scale. The application will have extensive data. Do not use designs that break when text strings are long.
Use progressive disclosure: hide complex filtering behind toggles or advanced panels.
Feedback is crucial: any 'Generate' or 'Calculate' action must give clear visual feedback immediately.
Error states must be helpful, not just red text. Offer recovery options.
